components.claim: Campaign-wide correction is fixed before metrics
components.observed_invariant_failure: A reduced self-consistent registry changes promotion
components.expected_fail_closed_behavior: Only the tracked 12x47 authority may evaluate promotion

components.claim: Exact bijective pairing is complete and order-independent
components.authorized_source: canonical pairing contract plus ledger evidence
components.observed_invariant_failure: Missing values, non-finite outcomes and row order can change accepted evidence
components.expected_fail_closed_behavior: Canonical IDs, finite values, complete fields and deterministic reconciliation

components.claim: Repeated economic evidence cannot inflate effective sample size
components.expected_fail_closed_behavior: n_eff is capped by unique economic dependencies

components.claim: Rejected or changed candidates cannot reach walk-forward
components.trust_boundary: validation output to lazy walk-forward supplier
components.authorized_source: finite validation metrics and immutable policy identity
components.observed_invariant_failure: NaN and parameter mutation can pass validation
components.expected_fail_closed_behavior: No walk-forward computation after any invalid metric or identity change

components.claim: Discovery partitions are valid, disjoint and causal
components.authorized_source: validated isolated discovery loader and dataset commitment
components.observed_invariant_failure: Invalid OHLC and cross-partition timestamp overlap are accepted
components.expected_fail_closed_behavior: Finite valid bars, strict boundaries and distinct files

components.claim: Simulation rejects malformed inputs without ambiguous behavior
components.trust_boundary: strategy parameters and bars to simulated money result
components.observed_invariant_failure: Unknown side is treated as SHORT and zero entry raises ZeroDivisionError
components.expected_fail_closed_behavior: Structured INVALID_INPUT with no promotion path

components.claim: Selection cannot load real holdout bars
components.trust_boundary: discovery process to sealed holdout root
components.expected_fail_closed_behavior: No holdout bars or capability in tournament object graph

components.claim: Evidence identifies the exact code and tracked inputs
components.trust_boundary: worktree and generated artifacts to manifest
components.observed_invariant_failure: Existing V10.47.23 manifest is obsolete after the authorized documentation commit
components.expected_fail_closed_behavior: Recompute affected outputs and seal final tracked state
